text:
SR_SPLM_FMLY_CMNTY_OVRL_SCRN_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: AHC data system 

VALUES: 0 = Did not screen positive for friends and community support need 
1 = Screened positive for friends and community support need 
Missing 

COMMENT: The variables considered for this indicator are SR_SPLMTL_FMLY_CMNTY_SPRT_1_CD (value of 2 = I 
could use a little more help or 3 = I need a lot more help) and SR_SPLMTL_FMLY_CMNTY_SPRT_2_CD 
(value of 3 = Often or 4 = Always). This field is “1” if either
